◆ Emit()

void llvm::MCLOHContainer::Emit ( MachObjectWriter & ObjWriter,
const MCAsmLayout & Layout ) const
inline

Emit all Linker Optimization Hint in one big table. Each line of the table is emitted by LOHDirective::Emit.
